mapper.update: UPDATE household_member SET member_status = #{status}, leave_date = #{leaveDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND member_status = 'CURRENT'
UPDATE household_member SET member_status = 'CANCELLED', leave_date = #{leaveDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND member_status = 'CURRENT'
